notes: Source catalog for expanding PathScout beyond the seed company watchlist. These are monitoring targets, not all active fetch sources yet.

vc_portfolios.name: Lux Capital
vc_portfolios.why: Deep tech, defense, AI, robotics, manufacturing.

vc_portfolios.name: DCVC
vc_portfolios.why: Deep tech, physical AI, robotics, industrial systems.

vc_portfolios.why: AI leaders and late-stage breakout companies.

vc_portfolios.name: Conviction
vc_portfolios.why: AI-native applications and early-stage AI companies.

vc_portfolios.why: Climate, industrial, defense, and frontier physical-world companies.

vc_portfolios.why: Manufacturing, logistics, supply chain, hard industries.

vc_portfolios.name: Primary Venture Partners
vc_portfolios.why: New York AI, marketplaces, enterprise applications.
